quality_findings.finding: Chat-only input was partially summarized with evidence-like/documental wording.
quality_findings.required_hardening: Force chat-only input to remain unverified signal/inference unless a real artifact is supplied.

quality_findings.finding: Evidence density and confidence appeared too high for unverified user signal.
quality_findings.required_hardening: Require explicit caveat and limited evidence language for chat-only inputs.

quality_findings.finding: Response displayed ranges and multiple delta values without source labels.
quality_findings.required_hardening: Require exact values and source labels from tool responses.

passed_controls: raw signal not treated as truth
